result.stdout:
TinyRecoil.There:
  connect there and provider proxy service.

Usage:
  TinyRecoil.There [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>              path to config file
  -s, --server-addr <server-addr>     server address
  -p, --server-port <server-port>    server port, default: 8388
  -k, --password <password>          password
  -t, --timeout <timeout>            timeout in seconds, default: 300
  -m, --method <method>              encryption method, default: aes-256-cfb
  --version                          Display version information

commands.payload:
TinyRecoil.There:
  connect there and provider proxy service.

Usage:
  TinyRecoil.There [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>              path to config file
  -s, --server-addr <server-addr>     server address
  -p, --server-port <server-port>    server port, default: 8388
  -k, --password <password>          password
  -t, --timeout <timeout>            timeout in seconds, default: 300
  -m, --method <method>              encryption method, default: aes-256-cfb
  --version                          Display version information
